name: ludion-relay-template
description: Ludion fallback relay: one-click OpenAI-compatible relay (Cloudflare Worker). Your provider key stays in your own Cloudflare account.

PROVIDER_API_KEY.description: Your provider API key. You enter it here in Cloudflare. It is never sent to Ludion.

RELAY_TOKEN.description: Paste the relay token shown in your Ludion workspace. It must match exactly, or the relay returns 401.

UPSTREAM_BASE_URL.description: Your provider's OpenAI-compatible base URL. It must match your fallback model's provider.

ALLOWED_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated origins allowed to call this relay. Use your app's domain.
